title: Canonical custom error selectors for Gaslite assembly — always use these exact values
description: The definitive selector table for all Gaslite custom errors. Every selector is the first 4 bytes of keccak256(errorSignature) verified with cast sig. NEVER invent or guess selectors. ALWAYS declare the corresponding error in the contract (e.g. error NotOwner();) so ABI decoders can identify reverts. Use revert(0x1c, 0x04) — not revert(0x00, 0x04) — because mstore writes right-aligned so the selector sits at bytes 28-31 (offset 0x1c).
